x---
title: "Gene Expression and ASE in F1*Pi and F1*GL"
author: "Muhammad Arsalan Iqbal"
date: "2025-01-20"
output: word_document
---

## Working directory setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "Z:/FBNProjectGroups/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/RNA-Seq_data_DE_Analysis/Input File")

```

## loading required libraries

```{r Load the required libraries}
library(DESeq2)
library(dplyr)
library(lattice)
library(ggplot2)
library (stats)
library(factoextra)
library(FactoMineR)
library(PCAtools)
library(ellipse)
library(bigutilsr)
library(bigstatsr)
library(ggforce)
library(ggalt)
library(outliers)
library(extremevalues)
library(mvoutlier)
library(car)
library(tidyr)
library(withr)
library(tibble)
library(gridExtra)
library(circlize)
library(sva)
library(arrayQualityMetrics)
library(edgeR)
```

##loading Input data


## Differential Expression analysis 

```{r Differential Expression analysis}



# Load required libraries
# --------------------------------------
# Load required libraries
# --------------------------------------
library(DESeq2)
library(sva)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggfortify)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(fmsb)

# --------------------------------------
# Load and preprocess data
# --------------------------------------
raw <- read.csv("Raw_count_table_Final.csv", check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
colnames(raw)[1] <- "GeneID"
raw <- raw[!duplicated(raw$GeneID), ]
rownames(raw) <- raw$GeneID
count_data <- as.matrix(raw[, -1])

dim(count_data)

metadata <- read.csv("Metadata_Final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    BC = factor(gsub("\\s*\\*\\s*", "*", BC), levels = c("F1*GL", "F1*Pi")),
    Tissue = factor(Tissue),
    Sex = factor(Sex)
  ) %>%
  filter(Samples %in% colnames(count_data)) %>%
  arrange(match(Samples, colnames(count_data)))

tissues <- c("Liver", "Brain", "Muscle", "Kidney", "Ovary", "Testis")

tissue_colors <- c(
  Liver = "#D55E00", Brain = "#0072B2", Muscle = "#009E73", 
  Kidney = "#F0E", Ovary = "#CC79A7", Testis = "#56B4E9"
)
backcross_shapes <- c("F1*Pi" = 16, "F1*GL" = 17)

# --------------------------------------
# Global VST normalization
# --------------------------------------
dds_all <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data, metadata, design = ~1)
dds_all <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_all)
vsd_all <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds_all)
vsd_mat <- assay(vsd_all)

# Storage
summary_df <- data.frame()
tissue_plots <- list()
sv_counts <- list()
retained_genes <- list()
divergence_metrics <- list()
correlations_df <- data.frame(Tissue = character(), Pearson = numeric(), Spearman = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# --------------------------------------
# Function for tissue-specific analysis
# --------------------------------------
run_tissue_analysis <- function(tiss) {
  cat("\nProcessing tissue:", tiss, "\n")

  meta_t <- metadata %>% filter(Tissue == tiss) %>% droplevels()
  counts_t <- count_data[, meta_t$Samples, drop = FALSE]
  keep <- rowSums(counts_t >= 5) >= 0.8 * ncol(counts_t)
  counts_t <- counts_t[keep, ]
  retained_genes[[tiss]] <<- rownames(counts_t)

  if (ncol(counts_t) < 5 || length(unique(meta_t$BC)) < 2) {
    warning("Skipping ", tiss, ": insufficient samples or variation")
    return(NULL)
  }

  if (tiss %in% c("Ovary", "Testis")) {
    mod_full <- model.matrix(~ BC, data = meta_t)
    mod_null <- model.matrix(~ 1, data = meta_t)
  } else {
    mod_full <- model.matrix(~ BC + Sex, data = meta_t)
    mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Sex, data = meta_t)
  }

  dds0 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(counts_t, meta_t, design = mod_full)
  dds0 <- estimateSizeFactors(dds0)
  vsd <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds0)

  n.sv <- num.sv(assay(vsd), mod_full, method = "be")
  sv_counts[[tiss]] <<- n.sv
  if (n.sv > 0) {
    svobj <- sva(assay(vsd), mod_full, mod_null, n.sv = n.sv)
    sv_cols <- paste0("SV", 1:n.sv)
    meta_t[sv_cols] <- svobj$sv
  } else {
    sv_cols <- character(0)
  }

  design_formula <- if (tiss %in% c("Ovary", "Testis")) {
    as.formula(paste("~ BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
  } else {
    as.formula(paste("~ BC + Sex", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
  }

  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(counts_t, meta_t, design = design_formula)
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  res_all <- results(dds, contrast = c("BC", "F1*GL", "F1*Pi"))
  res_all_df <- as.data.frame(res_all)
  write.csv(res_all_df, paste0(tiss, "_DEG_All_Results.csv"))

  res_sig <- res_all_df %>% filter(padj < 0.05)
  if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) {
    write.csv(res_sig, paste0(tiss, "_DEG_Significant_Results.csv"))
  }

  deg_effect <- if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) mean(abs(res_sig$log2FoldChange), na.rm = TRUE) else 0
  transcriptome_divergence <- if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) sum(2^abs(res_sig$log2FoldChange)) / nrow(counts_t) else 0

  pca_all_data <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "BC", returnData = TRUE)
  percentVar_all <- round(100 * attr(pca_all_data, "percentVar"))
  pca_all_data$Tissue <- tiss

  p_all <- ggplot(pca_all_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = BC)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    stat_ellipse(aes(group = BC), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors[tiss]) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
    labs(title = paste("Standard PCA:", tiss),
         x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_all[1], "% variance"),
         y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_all[2], "% variance")) +
    theme_minimal()

  tissue_plots[[tiss]] <<- list(standard = p_all, deg = NULL)

  avg_expr <- data.frame(
    Gene = rownames(vsd),
    F1_GL = rowMeans(assay(vsd)[, meta_t$BC == "F1*GL", drop = FALSE]),
    F1_Pi = rowMeans(assay(vsd)[, meta_t$BC == "F1*Pi", drop = FALSE])
  )
  avg_expr <- avg_expr %>% filter(Gene %in% retained_genes[[tiss]])

  cor_pearson <- cor(avg_expr$F1_GL, avg_expr$F1_Pi, method = "pearson")
  cor_spearman <- cor(avg_expr$F1_GL, avg_expr$F1_Pi, method = "spearman")

  correlations_df <<- rbind(correlations_df, data.frame(
    Tissue = tiss,
    Pearson = cor_pearson,
    Spearman = cor_spearman
  ))

  list(
    summary = data.frame(
      Tissue = tiss,
      Samples = ncol(counts_t),
      Genes_Retained = sum(keep),
      SVs_Used = n.sv,
      DEGs_Total = nrow(res_sig),
      DEGs_Up_F1GL = sum(res_sig$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      DEGs_Down_F1GL = sum(res_sig$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      Avg_abs_log2FC = deg_effect,
      Transcriptome_Divergence = transcriptome_divergence,
      Separation_Distance = NA,
      Pearson_Correlation = cor_pearson,
      Spearman_Correlation = cor_spearman
    )
  )
}

# --------------------------------------
# Run tissue analysis
# --------------------------------------
for (tiss in tissues) {
  res <- run_tissue_analysis(tiss)
  if (!is.null(res)) {
    summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_df, res$summary)
  }
}

# --------------------------------------
# Normalize divergence metrics by sqrt(n_DEGs)
# --------------------------------------
summary_df <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    # Normalized divergence score (Δ')
    Delta_norm = ifelse(DEGs_Total > 0, Transcriptome_Divergence / sqrt(DEGs_Total), 0),
    # Normalized centroid distance (D')
    Distance_norm = ifelse(DEGs_Total > 0, Separation_Distance / sqrt(DEGs_Total), 0)
  )

# Save updated summary
write.csv(summary_df, "Summary_DEG_Results_with_Normalized_Metrics.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# --------------------------------------
# Plot normalized divergence metrics (New Figure 3B/C)
# --------------------------------------
# Ensure tissues are in order
summary_df$Tissue <- factor(summary_df$Tissue, levels = c("Kidney", "Muscle", "Liver", "Brain", "Ovary", "Testis", "Global"))

# Plot normalized divergence score (Δ')
p_delta_norm <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Tissue, y = Delta_norm, fill = Tissue)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tissue_colors[as.character(summary_df$Tissue)]) +
  labs(title = "Normalized Transcriptomic Divergence (Δ')",
       y = "Δ' (normalized by √n_DEGs)",
       x = "Tissue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Plot normalized centroid distance (D')
p_distance_norm <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Tissue, y = Distance_norm, fill = Tissue)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tissue_colors[as.character(summary_df$Tissue)]) +
  labs(title = "Normalized Centroid Distance (D')",
       y = "D' (normalized by √n_DEGs)",
       x = "Tissue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Combine plots
combined_norm_plots <- p_delta_norm + p_distance_norm +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')

# Save
ggsave("Figure_3B_3C_Normalized_Divergence.pdf", combined_norm_plots, width = 12, height = 6)
print(combined_norm_plots)







# --------------------------------------
# Global DEG analysis with SVA
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nEstimating global surrogate variables for batch correction...\n")

keep_global <- rowSums(count_data >= 5) >= 0.8 * ncol(count_data)
count_data_global <- count_data[keep_global, ]

metadata_global <- metadata %>% filter(Samples %in% colnames(count_data_global)) %>%
  arrange(match(Samples, colnames(count_data_global)))

include_sex <- all(!is.na(metadata_global$Sex)) && length(unique(metadata_global$Sex)) > 1

if (include_sex) {
  mod_full <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + Sex + BC, data = metadata_global)
  mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + Sex, data = metadata_global)
} else {
  mod_full <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + BC, data = metadata_global)
  mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Tissue, data = metadata_global)
}

dds_tmp <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data_global, metadata_global, design = mod_full)
dds_tmp <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_tmp)
vsd_tmp <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds_tmp)

n_sv_global <- num.sv(assay(vsd_tmp), mod_full, method = "be")
cat("Number of surrogate variables estimated globally:", n_sv_global, "\n")

if (n_sv_global > 0) {
  svobj_global <- sva(assay(vsd_tmp), mod_full, mod_null, n.sv = n_sv_global)
  sv_cols <- paste0("SV", 1:n_sv_global)
  metadata_global[sv_cols] <- svobj_global$sv
} else {
  sv_cols <- character(0)
}

design_formula_global <- if (include_sex) {
  as.formula(paste("~ Tissue + Sex + BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
} else {
  as.formula(paste("~ Tissue + BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
}

dds_global <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data_global, metadata_global, design = design_formula_global)
dds_global <- DESeq(dds_global)

res_global <- results(dds_global, contrast = c("BC", "F1*GL", "F1*Pi"))
res_global_df <- as.data.frame(res_global)
write.csv(res_global_df, "Global_DEG_All_Results_with_SVs.csv")

res_global_sig <- res_global_df %>% filter(padj < 0.05)
if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) {
  write.csv(res_global_sig, "Global_DEG_Significant_Results_with_SVs.csv")
  cat("Significant DEGs (padj < 0.05) with SV correction:", nrow(res_global_sig), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant DEGs found in global analysis with SV correction.\n")
}

# Global metrics and append to summary
deg_effect_global <- if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) mean(abs(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange), na.rm = TRUE) else 0
transcriptome_divergence_global <- if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) sum(2^abs(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange)) / nrow(count_data_global) else 0

avg_expr_global <- data.frame(
  Gene = rownames(vsd_tmp),
  F1_GL = rowMeans(assay(vsd_tmp)[, metadata_global$BC == "F1*GL", drop = FALSE]),
  F1_Pi = rowMeans(assay(vsd_tmp)[, metadata_global$BC == "F1*Pi", drop = FALSE])
)

cor_pearson_global <- cor(avg_expr_global$F1_GL, avg_expr_global$F1_Pi, method = "pearson")
cor_spearman_global <- cor(avg_expr_global$F1_GL, avg_expr_global$F1_Pi, method = "spearman")

correlations_df <- bind_rows(correlations_df, data.frame(
  Tissue = "Global",
  Pearson = cor_pearson_global,
  Spearman = cor_spearman_global
))

global_summary <- data.frame(
  Tissue = "Global",
  Samples = ncol(count_data_global),
  Genes_Retained = nrow(count_data_global),
  SVs_Used = n_sv_global,
  DEGs_Total = nrow(res_global_sig),
  DEGs_Up_F1GL = sum(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  DEGs_Down_F1GL = sum(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  Avg_abs_log2FC = deg_effect_global,
  Transcriptome_Divergence = transcriptome_divergence_global,
  Separation_Distance = NA,
  Pearson_Correlation = cor_pearson_global,
  Spearman_Correlation = cor_spearman_global
)

summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_df, global_summary)

write.csv(summary_df, "Summary_DEG_Results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(correlations_df, "Tissue_F1GL_vs_F1Pi_Correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# [Remaining volcano and PCA plots remain unchanged...]


# --------------------------------------
# Global batch effect correction using SVA and DESeq2
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nEstimating global surrogate variables for batch correction...\n")

# Filter genes for global analysis (≥5 counts in ≥80% samples)
keep_global <- rowSums(count_data >= 5) >= 0.8 * ncol(count_data)
count_data_global <- count_data[keep_global, ]

# Filter metadata to match count_data_global columns
metadata_global <- metadata %>% filter(Samples %in% colnames(count_data_global)) %>%
  arrange(match(Samples, colnames(count_data_global)))

# Build full and null model matrices for SVA (BC is variable of interest)
include_sex <- all(!is.na(metadata_global$Sex)) && length(unique(metadata_global$Sex)) > 1

if (include_sex) {
  mod_full <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + Sex + BC, data = metadata_global)
  mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + Sex, data = metadata_global)
} else {
  mod_full <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + BC, data = metadata_global)
  mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Tissue, data = metadata_global)
}

# VST transform counts for SVA input
dds_tmp <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data_global, metadata_global, design = mod_full)
dds_tmp <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_tmp)
vsd_tmp <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds_tmp)

# Estimate number of SVs globally
n_sv_global <- num.sv(assay(vsd_tmp), mod_full, method = "be")
cat("Number of surrogate variables estimated globally:", n_sv_global, "\n")

# Run SVA if SVs detected
if (n_sv_global > 0) {
  svobj_global <- sva(assay(vsd_tmp), mod_full, mod_null, n.sv = n_sv_global)
  sv_cols <- paste0("SV", 1:n_sv_global)
  metadata_global[sv_cols] <- svobj_global$sv
} else {
  sv_cols <- character(0)
}

# Update design formula including SVs
design_formula_global <- if (include_sex) {
  as.formula(paste("~ Tissue + Sex + BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
} else {
  as.formula(paste("~ Tissue + BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
}

# Create DESeq2 dataset with surrogate variables
dds_global <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data_global, metadata_global, design = design_formula_global)

# Run DESeq2
dds_global <- DESeq(dds_global)

# Extract global results for BC contrast
res_global <- results(dds_global, contrast = c("BC", "F1*GL", "F1*Pi"))
res_global_df <- as.data.frame(res_global)
write.csv(res_global_df, "Global_DEG_All_Results_with_SVs.csv")

# Filter significant global DEGs (padj < 0.05)
res_global_sig <- res_global_df %>% filter(padj < 0.05)
if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) {
  write.csv(res_global_sig, "Global_DEG_Significant_Results_with_SVs.csv")
  cat("Significant DEGs (padj < 0.05) with SV correction:", nrow(res_global_sig), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant DEGs found in global analysis with SV correction.\n")
}

# Volcano plot function
plot_volcano <- function(file_path, tissue_name) {
  df <- read.csv(file_path, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$gene <- rownames(df)
  df <- df[!is.na(df$padj), ]

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      DEGs = case_when(
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 0 ~ "Upregulated",
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < 0 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      )
    )

  top_genes <- df %>%
    filter(DEGs != "Not Significant") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)

  max_fc <- max(abs(df$log2FoldChange), na.rm = TRUE)
  x_lim <- ceiling(max_fc * 1.1)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = DEGs)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = filter(df, DEGs != "Not Significant"), size = 3) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = ifelse(gene %in% top_genes$gene, gene, NA)),
                    max.overlaps = 10, box.padding = 0.5, size = 3.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Upregulated" = "red",
      "Downregulated" = "darkgreen",
      "Not Significant" = "gray70"
    )) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    labs(title = tissue_name, x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10 Adjusted P-value") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")
    )

  return(p)
}

# Create volcano plots
files <- paste0(tissues, "_DEG_All_Results.csv")
volcano_plots <- mapply(plot_volcano, files, tissues, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(volcano_plots) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Volcano Plots of DEGs Across Tissues",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold")),
    tag_levels = "A"
  )

ggsave("Combined_Volcano_Plots.pdf", combined_plot, width = 14, height = 12)
print(combined_plot)

# Global volcano plot
p_global <- plot_volcano("Global_DEG_All_Results.csv", "Global: All Tissues")
ggsave("Global_Volcano_Plot.pdf", p_global, width = 7, height = 6)
print(p_global)


# --------------------------------------
# Global PCA plot
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nCreating PCA plot for global dataset...\n")

pca_data_global <- plotPCA(vsd_all, intgroup = c("Tissue", "BC"), returnData = TRUE)
percentVar_global <- round(100 * attr(pca_data_global, "percentVar"))

p_pca_global <- ggplot(pca_data_global, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = BC)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = interaction(Tissue, BC)), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
  labs(title = "Global PCA: All Tissues",
       x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_global[1], "% variance"),
       y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_global[2], "% variance")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

ggsave("Global_PCA_Plot.pdf", p_pca_global, width = 8, height = 6)
print(p_pca_global)

# --------------------------------------
# Save PCA plots for each tissue
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nSaving individual PCA plots for each tissue...\n")

pca_patchwork <- wrap_plots(
  lapply(names(tissue_plots), function(tiss) {
    if (!is.null(tissue_plots[[tiss]]$standard)) {
      ggsave(paste0(tiss, "_PCA_Plot.pdf"), tissue_plots[[tiss]]$standard, width = 6, height = 5)
      tissue_plots[[tiss]]$standard + ggtitle(tiss)
    } else {
      NULL
    }
  }),
  ncol = 3
)

ggsave("Combined_Tissue_PCA_Plots.pdf", pca_patchwork, width = 16, height = 10)
print(pca_patchwork)



# --------------------------------------
# End of script
# --------------------------------------



library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Function to plot and save boxplots for top DEGs in a tissue
plot_top_DEGs_boxplot <- function(tiss, count_data, metadata, deg_results_file, vsd_matrix, top_n = 5, save_path = NULL) {
  
  # Read DEG results
  deg_res <- read.csv(deg_results_file, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  # Filter significant DEGs (padj < 0.05)
  deg_sig <- deg_res %>% filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.05)
  
  if (nrow(deg_sig) == 0) {
    message("No significant DEGs for tissue: ", tiss)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Select top genes by smallest padj
  top_genes <- deg_sig %>% arrange(padj) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()
  
  # Subset VST matrix for samples in this tissue and for top genes
  meta_t <- metadata %>% filter(Tissue == tiss) %>% droplevels()
  samples_t <- meta_t$Samples
  vsd_sub <- vsd_matrix[top_genes, samples_t, drop = FALSE]
  
  # Convert to long format for ggplot
  expr_long <- as.data.frame(t(vsd_sub)) %>%
    mutate(Sample = rownames(.)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -Sample, names_to = "Gene", values_to = "VST_expr") %>%
    left_join(meta_t[, c("Samples", "BC")], by = c("Sample" = "Samples"))
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(expr_long, aes(x = BC, y = VST_expr, fill = BC)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("F1*GL" = "#E69F00", "F1*Pi" = "#56B4E9")) +
    labs(title = paste("Top", top_n, "DEGs in", tiss, "with VST expression"),
         y = "VST expression", x = "Backcross") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  # Save or print plot
  if (!is.null(save_path)) {
    ggsave(filename = save_path, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6)
    message("Saved plot for ", tiss, " to ", save_path)
  } else {
    print(p)
  }
}

# Make sure output folder exists
if (!dir.exists("plots")) dir.create("plots")

# Vector of tissue names you want to process
tissues <- unique(metadata$Tissue)  # example tissue names

# Folder where DEG CSV files are located
deg_results_folder <- "Z:/FBNProjectGroups/I3-NGS-noncoding/Muhammad/F2embryo/RNA-Seq_data_DE_Analysis/Input File"  # adjust this path as needed

# Loop through tissues and generate/save plots
for (tiss in tissues) {
  deg_file <- file.path(deg_results_folder, paste0(tiss, "_DEG_All_Results.csv"))
  plot_file <- file.path("plots", paste0(tiss, "_top_DEGs_boxplot.pdf"))
  
  if (file.exists(deg_file)) {
    plot_top_DEGs_boxplot(
      tiss = tiss,
      count_data = count_data,
      metadata = metadata,
      deg_results_file = deg_file,
      vsd_matrix = vsd_mat,
      top_n = 5,
      save_path = plot_file
    )
  } else {
    message("No DEG file found for tissue: ", tiss)
  }
}

library(dplyr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Ss.eg.db)
library(biomaRt)
library(readr)
library(pheatmap)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

# 1. Gene mapping function (Ensembl or SYMBOL to ENTREZID)
map_genes_to_entrez <- function(genes) {
  ensembl_ids <- genes[grepl("^ENS", genes)]
  symbols <- setdiff(genes, ensembl_ids)
  
  pig_mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "sscrofa_gene_ensembl")
  
  ensembl_map <- getBM(
    attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "entrezgene_id"),
    filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
    values = ensembl_ids,
    mart = pig_mart
  )
  ensembl_entrez <- ensembl_map$entrezgene_id
  
  symbol_map <- tryCatch(
    bitr(symbols, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Ss.eg.db),
    error = function(e) data.frame(SYMBOL=character(), ENTREZID=character())
  )
  symbol_entrez <- symbol_map$ENTREZID
  
  entrez_ids <- unique(c(ensembl_entrez, symbol_entrez))
  entrez_ids <- entrez_ids[!is.na(entrez_ids)]
  return(entrez_ids)
}

# 2. Enrichment functions
run_kegg_enrich <- function(gene_vec) {
  if (length(gene_vec) < 5) return(NULL)
  enrichKEGG(gene = gene_vec, organism = "ssc", pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "BH")
}

run_go_bp_enrich <- function(gene_vec) {
  if (length(gene_vec) < 5) return(NULL)
  enrichGO(gene = gene_vec, OrgDb = org.Ss.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP",
           pvalueCutoff = 1, pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = TRUE)
}

# 3. Combine enrichment scores with stats function - NO filtering here!
combine_scores_with_stats <- function(enrich_up, enrich_down, prefix = "") {
  up_df <- if (!is.null(enrich_up)) as.data.frame(enrich_up) else data.frame()
  down_df <- if (!is.null(enrich_down)) as.data.frame(enrich_down) else data.frame()
  
  # No filtering applied: keep all results
  up_scores <- up_df %>%
    mutate(score_up = -log10(pvalue)) %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, score_up, pvalue_up = pvalue, p.adjust_up = p.adjust, Count_up = Count)
  
  down_scores <- down_df %>%
    mutate(score_down = -log10(pvalue)) %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, score_down, pvalue_down = pvalue, p.adjust_down = p.adjust, Count_down = Count)
  
  combined <- full_join(up_scores, down_scores, by = c("ID", "Description")) %>%
    mutate(
      score_up = ifelse(is.na(score_up), 0, score_up),
      score_down = ifelse(is.na(score_down), 0, score_down),
      score = score_up - score_down,
      ID = paste0(prefix, ID)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, score,
           pvalue_up, p.adjust_up, Count_up,
           pvalue_down, p.adjust_down, Count_down)
  
  return(combined)
}

# 4. Load your global DEG data
deg_global <- read_csv("Global_DEG_Significant_Results_with_SVs.csv")
colnames(deg_global)

# Check required columns
stopifnot(all(c("Gene", "log2FoldChange") %in% colnames(deg_global)))

# 5. Separate upregulated and downregulated genes for F1_GL vs F1_Pi
genes_up <- deg_global$Gene[deg_global$log2FoldChange > 0]
genes_down <- deg_global$Gene[deg_global$log2FoldChange < 0]

# 6. Map gene IDs to Entrez IDs
entrez_up <- map_genes_to_entrez(genes_up)
entrez_down <- map_genes_to_entrez(genes_down)

# 7. Run enrichment analyses
kegg_up <- run_kegg_enrich(entrez_up)
kegg_down <- run_kegg_enrich(entrez_down)
go_up <- run_go_bp_enrich(entrez_up)
go_down <- run_go_bp_enrich(entrez_down)

# 8. Combine enrichment results with stats (prefixes "KEGG_" and "GO_") - no filtering applied
kegg_results <- combine_scores_with_stats(kegg_up, kegg_down, prefix = "KEGG_")
go_results <- combine_scores_with_stats(go_up, go_down, prefix = "GO_")

# 9. Save full enrichment tables (all results)
write.csv(kegg_results, "Global_KEGG_Enrichment_F1_GL_vs_F1_Pi.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(go_results, "Global_GO_BP_Enrichment_F1_GL_vs_F1_Pi.csv", row.names = FALSE)

`



# --------------------------------------
# Load required libraries
# --------------------------------------
library(DESeq2)
library(sva)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggfortify)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(fmsb)

# --------------------------------------
# Load and preprocess data
# --------------------------------------
raw <- read.csv("Raw_count_table_Final.csv", check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
colnames(raw)[1] <- "GeneID"
raw <- raw[!duplicated(raw$GeneID), ]
rownames(raw) <- raw$GeneID
count_data <- as.matrix(raw[, -1])

dim(count_data)

metadata <- read.csv("Metadata_Final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    BC = factor(gsub("\\s*\\*\\s*", "*", BC), levels = c("F1*GL", "F1*Pi")),
    Tissue = factor(Tissue),
    Sex = factor(Sex)
  ) %>%
  filter(Samples %in% colnames(count_data)) %>%
  arrange(match(Samples, colnames(count_data)))

tissues <- c("Liver", "Brain", "Muscle", "Kidney", "Ovary", "Testis")

tissue_colors <- c(
  Liver = "#D55E00", Brain = "#0072B2", Muscle = "#009E73", 
  Kidney = "#F0E", Ovary = "#CC79A7", Testis = "#56B4E9"
)
backcross_shapes <- c("F1*Pi" = 16, "F1*GL" = 17)


# --------------------------------------
# Global VST normalization
# --------------------------------------
dds_all <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data, metadata, design = ~1)
dds_all <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_all)
vsd_all <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds_all)
vsd_mat <- assay(vsd_all)

# Storage
summary_df <- data.frame()
tissue_plots <- list()
sv_counts <- list()
retained_genes <- list()
divergence_metrics <- list()
correlations_df <- data.frame(Tissue = character(), Pearson = numeric(), Spearman = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# --------------------------------------
# Modified function for tissue-specific analysis with DEG-PCA
# --------------------------------------
run_tissue_analysis <- function(tiss) {
  cat("\nProcessing tissue:", tiss, "\n")
  
  meta_t <- metadata %>% filter(Tissue == tiss) %>% droplevels()
  counts_t <- count_data[, meta_t$Samples, drop = FALSE]
  keep <- rowSums(counts_t >= 5) >= 0.8 * ncol(counts_t)
  counts_t <- counts_t[keep, ]
  retained_genes[[tiss]] <<- rownames(counts_t)
  
  if (ncol(counts_t) < 5 || length(unique(meta_t$BC)) < 2) {
    warning("Skipping ", tiss, ": insufficient samples or variation")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  if (tiss %in% c("Ovary", "Testis")) {
    mod_full <- model.matrix(~ BC, data = meta_t)
    mod_null <- model.matrix(~ 1, data = meta_t)
  } else {
    mod_full <- model.matrix(~ BC + Sex, data = meta_t)
    mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Sex, data = meta_t)
  }
  
  dds0 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(counts_t, meta_t, design = mod_full)
  dds0 <- estimateSizeFactors(dds0)
  vsd <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds0)
  
  n.sv <- num.sv(assay(vsd), mod_full, method = "be")
  sv_counts[[tiss]] <<- n.sv
  if (n.sv > 0) {
    svobj <- sva(assay(vsd), mod_full, mod_null, n.sv = n.sv)
    sv_cols <- paste0("SV", 1:n.sv)
    meta_t[sv_cols] <- svobj$sv
  } else {
    sv_cols <- character(0)
  }
  
  design_formula <- if (tiss %in% c("Ovary", "Testis")) {
    as.formula(paste("~ BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
  } else {
    as.formula(paste("~ BC + Sex", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
  }
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(counts_t, meta_t, design = design_formula)
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  res_all <- results(dds, contrast = c("BC", "F1*GL", "F1*Pi"))
  res_all_df <- as.data.frame(res_all)
  write.csv(res_all_df, paste0(tiss, "_DEG_All_Results.csv"))
  
  res_sig <- res_all_df %>% filter(padj < 0.05)
  if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) {
    write.csv(res_sig, paste0(tiss, "_DEG_Significant_Results.csv"))
  }
  
  deg_effect <- if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) mean(abs(res_sig$log2FoldChange), na.rm = TRUE) else 0
  transcriptome_divergence <- if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) sum(2^abs(res_sig$log2FoldChange)) / nrow(counts_t) else 0
  
  # Standard PCA
  pca_all_data <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "BC", returnData = TRUE)
  percentVar_all <- round(100 * attr(pca_all_data, "percentVar"))
  pca_all_data$Tissue <- tiss
  
  p_all <- ggplot(pca_all_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = BC, shape = BC)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    stat_ellipse(aes(group = BC), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = backcross_colors) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
    labs(title = paste("Standard PCA:", tiss),
         x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_all[1], "% variance"),
         y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_all[2], "% variance")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  # DEG-focused PCA
  separation_distance <- NA
  p_degs <- NULL
  
  if (nrow(res_sig) > 0) {
    # Subset to significant DEGs
    deg_counts <- counts_t[rownames(counts_t) %in% rownames(res_sig), , drop = FALSE]
    
    # Create DESeq object for DEGs
    dds_degs <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
      deg_counts,
      colData = meta_t,
      design = design_formula
    )
    
    # Variance stabilizing transformation
    vsd_degs <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds_degs)
    
    # Perform PCA
    pca_data_degs <- plotPCA(vsd_degs, intgroup = "BC", returnData = TRUE)
    percentVar_degs <- round(100 * attr(pca_data_degs, "percentVar"))
    
    # Calculate separation distance between centroids
    centroids <- pca_data_degs %>%
      group_by(BC) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2))
    
    separation_distance <- dist(centroids[, c("PC1", "PC2")]) %>% as.numeric()
    
    # Create DEG-PCA plot
    p_degs <- ggplot(pca_data_degs, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = BC, shape = BC)) +
      geom_point(size = 3) +
      geom_point(data = centroids, size = 5, shape = 3, color = "black", stroke = 1.5) +
      stat_ellipse(aes(group = BC), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
      scale_color_manual(values = backcross_colors) +
      scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
      labs(title = paste("DEG-Focused PCA:", tiss),
           x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_degs[1], "% variance"),
           y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_degs[2], "% variance"),
           subtitle = paste0(nrow(res_sig), " DEGs | Separation Distance = ", 
                            round(separation_distance, 3))) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  } else {
    # Create placeholder plot if no DEGs
    p_degs <- ggplot() + 
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No significant DEGs", size = 6) + 
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = paste("DEG-Focused PCA:", tiss))
  }
  
  tissue_plots[[tiss]] <<- list(standard = p_all, deg = p_degs)
  
  # Expression correlation
  avg_expr <- data.frame(
    Gene = rownames(vsd),
    F1_GL = rowMeans(assay(vsd)[, meta_t$BC == "F1*GL", drop = FALSE]),
    F1_Pi = rowMeans(assay(vsd)[, meta_t$BC == "F1*Pi", drop = FALSE])
  )
  avg_expr <- avg_expr %>% filter(Gene %in% retained_genes[[tiss]])
  
  cor_pearson <- cor(avg_expr$F1_GL, avg_expr$F1_Pi, method = "pearson")
  cor_spearman <- cor(avg_expr$F1_GL, avg_expr$F1_Pi, method = "spearman")
  
  correlations_df <<- rbind(correlations_df, data.frame(
    Tissue = tiss,
    Pearson = cor_pearson,
    Spearman = cor_spearman
  ))
  
  list(
    summary = data.frame(
      Tissue = tiss,
      Samples = ncol(counts_t),
      Genes_Retained = sum(keep),
      SVs_Used = n.sv,
      DEGs_Total = nrow(res_sig),
      DEGs_Up_F1GL = sum(res_sig$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      DEGs_Down_F1GL = sum(res_sig$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      Avg_abs_log2FC = deg_effect,
      Transcriptome_Divergence = transcriptome_divergence,
      Separation_Distance = separation_distance,
      Pearson_Correlation = cor_pearson,
      Spearman_Correlation = cor_spearman
    )
  )
}

# --------------------------------------
# Run tissue analysis
# --------------------------------------
for (tiss in tissues) {
  res <- run_tissue_analysis(tiss)
  if (!is.null(res)) {
    summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_df, res$summary)
  }
}

# --------------------------------------
# Create diagnostic plots
# --------------------------------------
create_diagnostic_plots <- function(summary_df) {
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(patchwork)

  # Filter out Global and tissues without DEGs
  tissue_df <- summary_df %>% 
    filter(Tissue != "Global") %>%
    mutate(Tissue = factor(Tissue, levels = tissues))

  # A: DEG Directionality by Tissue with labels
  deg_direction <- tissue_df %>%
    dplyr::select(Tissue, DEGs_Up_F1GL, DEGs_Down_F1GL) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -Tissue, names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Count") %>%
    mutate(Direction = ifelse(grepl("Up", Direction), "Up in F1_GL", "Down in F1_GL"))

  p_A <- ggplot(deg_direction, aes(x = Tissue, y = Count, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    geom_text(aes(label = Count), 
              position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
              size = 3, color = "white") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up in F1_GL" = "red", "Down in F1_GL" = "darkgreen")) +
    labs(title = "A: DEG Directionality by Tissue", x = "", y = "Number of DEGs") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "right")

  # B: Separation Distance vs. Genes Retained with point labels
  p_B <- ggplot(tissue_df, aes(x = Genes_Retained, y = Separation_Distance)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Tissue), size = 5) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Separation_Distance, 2)), vjust = -1, size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "gray30", linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors) +
    labs(title = "B: Separation Distance vs. Genes Retained", 
         x = "Genes Retained", y = "Separation Distance (DEG-PCA)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "right")

  # C: Average Absolute log2FC (Lollipop Chart) with labels
  p_C <- ggplot(tissue_df, aes(x = reorder(Tissue, -Avg_abs_log2FC), y = Avg_abs_log2FC)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = Tissue, yend = 0), color = "gray50", linewidth = 1.5) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Tissue), size = 7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Avg_abs_log2FC, 2)), vjust = -1, size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors) +
    labs(title = "C: Average Absolute log2 Fold Change", 
         x = "", y = "Avg |log2 Fold Change|") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "right")

  # D: Transcriptome Divergence with labels
  p_D <- ggplot(tissue_df, aes(x = reorder(Tissue, -Transcriptome_Divergence), 
                               y = Transcriptome_Divergence, fill = Tissue)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Transcriptome_Divergence, 2)), 
              vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = tissue_colors) +
    labs(title = "D: Transcriptome Divergence", 
         x = "", y = "Transcriptome Divergence") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "right")

  # Combine diagnostic plots with individual legends
  diagnostic_plot <- (p_A + p_B) / (p_C + p_D) + 
    plot_annotation(title = "Transcriptomic Divergence Diagnostic Plots",
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))) +
    plot_layout(guides = "keep")  # Don't collect legends globally

  # Save to PDF with custom size
  ggsave("Diagnostic_Plots.pdf", diagnostic_plot, width = 14, height = 12)

  return(diagnostic_plot)
}

# --------------------------------------
# Global DEG analysis with SVA
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nEstimating global surrogate variables for batch correction...\n")

keep_global <- rowSums(count_data >= 5) >= 0.8 * ncol(count_data)
count_data_global <- count_data[keep_global, ]

metadata_global <- metadata %>% filter(Samples %in% colnames(count_data_global)) %>%
  arrange(match(Samples, colnames(count_data_global)))

include_sex <- all(!is.na(metadata_global$Sex)) && length(unique(metadata_global$Sex)) > 1

if (include_sex) {
  mod_full <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + Sex + BC, data = metadata_global)
  mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + Sex, data = metadata_global)
} else {
  mod_full <- model.matrix(~ Tissue + BC, data = metadata_global)
  mod_null <- model.matrix(~ Tissue, data = metadata_global)
}

dds_tmp <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data_global, metadata_global, design = mod_full)
dds_tmp <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_tmp)
vsd_tmp <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds_tmp)

n_sv_global <- num.sv(assay(vsd_tmp), mod_full, method = "be")
cat("Number of surrogate variables estimated globally:", n_sv_global, "\n")

if (n_sv_global > 0) {
  svobj_global <- sva(assay(vsd_tmp), mod_full, mod_null, n.sv = n_sv_global)
  sv_cols <- paste0("SV", 1:n_sv_global)
  metadata_global[sv_cols] <- svobj_global$sv
} else {
  sv_cols <- character(0)
}

design_formula_global <- if (include_sex) {
  as.formula(paste("~ Tissue + Sex + BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
} else {
  as.formula(paste("~ Tissue + BC", if(length(sv_cols)) paste("+", paste(sv_cols, collapse = " + ")) else ""))
}

dds_global <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(count_data_global, metadata_global, design = design_formula_global)
dds_global <- DESeq(dds_global)

res_global <- results(dds_global, contrast = c("BC", "F1*GL", "F1*Pi"))
res_global_df <- as.data.frame(res_global)
write.csv(res_global_df, "Global_DEG_All_Results_with_SVs.csv")

res_global_sig <- res_global_df %>% filter(padj < 0.05)
if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) {
  write.csv(res_global_sig, "Global_DEG_Significant_Results_with_SVs.csv")
  cat("Significant DEGs (padj < 0.05) with SV correction:", nrow(res_global_sig), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant DEGs found in global analysis with SV correction.\n")
}

# Global metrics and append to summary
deg_effect_global <- if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) mean(abs(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange), na.rm = TRUE) else 0
transcriptome_divergence_global <- if (nrow(res_global_sig) > 0) sum(2^abs(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange)) / nrow(count_data_global) else 0

avg_expr_global <- data.frame(
  Gene = rownames(vsd_tmp),
  F1_GL = rowMeans(assay(vsd_tmp)[, metadata_global$BC == "F1*GL", drop = FALSE]),
  F1_Pi = rowMeans(assay(vsd_tmp)[, metadata_global$BC == "F1*Pi", drop = FALSE])
)

cor_pearson_global <- cor(avg_expr_global$F1_GL, avg_expr_global$F1_Pi, method = "pearson")
cor_spearman_global <- cor(avg_expr_global$F1_GL, avg_expr_global$F1_Pi, method = "spearman")

correlations_df <- bind_rows(correlations_df, data.frame(
  Tissue = "Global",
  Pearson = cor_pearson_global,
  Spearman = cor_spearman_global
))

global_summary <- data.frame(
  Tissue = "Global",
  Samples = ncol(count_data_global),
  Genes_Retained = nrow(count_data_global),
  SVs_Used = n_sv_global,
  DEGs_Total = nrow(res_global_sig),
  DEGs_Up_F1GL = sum(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  DEGs_Down_F1GL = sum(res_global_sig$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  Avg_abs_log2FC = deg_effect_global,
  Transcriptome_Divergence = transcriptome_divergence_global,
  Separation_Distance = NA,
  Pearson_Correlation = cor_pearson_global,
  Spearman_Correlation = cor_spearman_global
)

summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_df, global_summary)

write.csv(summary_df, "Summary_DEG_Results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(correlations_df, "Tissue_F1GL_vs_F1Pi_Correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)




# --------------------------------------
# Generate and save plots
# --------------------------------------
# Create diagnostic plots

find("select")

# Save diagnostic plots to PDF with custom size
pdf("diagnostic_plots.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)  # Width and height in inches

# Create and print the diagnostic plots
create_diagnostic_plots(summary_df)
print(diag_plots)  # Or use a loop if diag_plots is a list

# Close the PDF device
dev.off()


select <- dplyr::select
diag_plots <- create_diagnostic_plots(summary_df)


# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)



# Rebuild each plot to enforce consistent color/shape aesthetics
deg_pca_plots <- lapply(tissues, function(tiss) {
  p <- tissue_plots[[tiss]]$deg
  
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    # Rebuild the plot with updated aesthetics (color = Tissue, shape = Backcross)
    p <- p +
      scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors) +
      scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
      ggtitle(tiss) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "bottom"
      )
    return(p)
  }
  return(NULL)
})

# Remove NULLs (in case any tissue didn't have a DEG plot)
deg_pca_plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), deg_pca_plots)

# Combine all DEG-PCA plots into a single layout
deg_pca_combined <- (
  wrap_plots(deg_pca_plots) + 
    plot_layout(ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
    plot_annotation(title = "DEG-Focused PCA by Tissue") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
)

# Save the final plot
ggsave("Combined_DEG_PCA_Plots.pdf", deg_pca_combined, width = 16, height = 10)



# Combine standard PCA plots
standard_pca_plots <- lapply(tissues, function(tiss) {
  if (!is.null(tissue_plots[[tiss]]$standard)) {
    return(tissue_plots[[tiss]]$standard)
  }
  return(NULL)
})

standard_pca_combined <- wrap_plots(standard_pca_plots) + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = "Standard PCA by Tissue") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Combined_Standard_PCA_Plots.pdf", standard_pca_combined, width = 16, height = 10)

# Volcano plot function
plot_volcano <- function(file_path, tissue_name) {
  df <- read.csv(file_path, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$gene <- rownames(df)
  df <- df[!is.na(df$padj), ]

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      DEGs = case_when(
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 0 ~ "Upregulated",
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < 0 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      )
    )

  top_genes <- df %>%
    filter(DEGs != "Not Significant") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)

  max_fc <- max(abs(df$log2FoldChange), na.rm = TRUE)
  x_lim <- ceiling(max_fc * 1.1)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = DEGs)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = filter(df, DEGs != "Not Significant"), size = 3) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = ifelse(gene %in% top_genes$gene, gene, NA)),
                    max.overlaps = 10, box.padding = 0.5, size = 3.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Upregulated" = "red",
      "Downregulated" = "darkgreen",
      "Not Significant" = "gray70"
    )) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-x_lim, x_lim)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    labs(title = tissue_name, x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10 Adjusted P-value") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")
    )

  return(p)
}

# Create volcano plots
files <- paste0(tissues, "_DEG_All_Results.csv")
volcano_plots <- mapply(plot_volcano, files, tissues, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(volcano_plots) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Volcano Plots of DEGs Across Tissues",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold")),
    tag_levels = "A"
  )

ggsave("Combined_Volcano_Plots.pdf", combined_plot, width = 14, height = 12)
print(combined_plot)

# Global volcano plot
p_global <- plot_volcano("Global_DEG_All_Results_with_SVs.csv", "Global: All Tissues")
ggsave("Global_Volcano_Plot.pdf", p_global, width = 7, height = 6)
print(p_global)

# --------------------------------------
# Global PCA plot
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nCreating PCA plot for global dataset...\n")

pca_data_global <- plotPCA(vsd_all, intgroup = c("Tissue", "BC"), returnData = TRUE)
percentVar_global <- round(100 * attr(pca_data_global, "percentVar"))

p_pca_global <- ggplot(pca_data_global, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = BC)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = interaction(Tissue, BC)), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
  labs(title = "Global PCA: All Tissues",
       x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_global[1], "% variance"),
       y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_global[2], "% variance")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Global_PCA_Plot.pdf", p_pca_global, width = 8, height = 6)
print(p_pca_global)

# --------------------------------------
# Print completion message
# --------------------------------------
cat("\nAnalysis complete! All outputs saved to working directory.\n")

# Assuming summary_df is already defined and loaded
diagnostic_plot <- create_diagnostic_plots(summary_df)

# --------------------------------------
# Create Consistent Color DEG-PCA Plots
# --------------------------------------

# Function to create DEG-PCA with tissue-specific coloring
create_tissue_deg_pca <- function(tiss) {
  # Load DEG results
  deg_file <- paste0(tiss, "_DEG_Significant_Results.csv")
  if (!file.exists(deg_file) return(NULL)
  
  deg_genes <- read.csv(deg_file, row.names = 1) %>% rownames()
  
  # Get metadata for tissue
  meta_t <- metadata %>% filter(Tissue == tiss) %>% droplevels()
  
  # Subset VSD data to DEGs
  vsd_t <- vsd_mat[rownames(vsd_mat) %in% deg_genes, meta_t$Samples]
  
  # Perform PCA
  pca <- prcomp(t(vsd_t), scale. = TRUE)
  pca_data <- as.data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2])
  percent_var <- round(100 * pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2))
  
  # Add metadata
  pca_data$Samples <- rownames(pca_data)
  pca_data <- merge(pca_data, meta_t, by = "Samples")
  
  # Calculate centroids
  centroids <- pca_data %>%
    group_by(BC) %>%
    summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2))
  
  # Create plot with tissue color
  ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, shape = BC)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = tissue_colors[tiss], alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = centroids, size = 6, shape = 3, color = "black", stroke = 1.5) +
    stat_ellipse(aes(group = BC), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.8) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
    labs(title = tiss,
         x = paste0("PC1: ", percent_var[1], "% variance"),
         y = paste0("PC2: ", percent_var[2], "% variance"),
         subtitle = paste0(length(deg_genes), " DEGs | ",
                          "Separation: ", 
                          round(dist(centroids[, c("PC1", "PC2")), 3))) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = element_text(color = tissue_colors[tiss], 
                                    face = "bold", size = 12))
}

# Create all tissue DEG-PCA plots with consistent colors
deg_pca_plots <- lapply(tissues, function(tiss) {
  cat("Creating DEG-PCA for:", tiss, "\n")
  p <- create_tissue_deg_pca(tiss)
  if (is.null(p)) {
    # Create empty plot with message
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
               label = paste("No DEGs in", tiss), size = 5) +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = tiss)
  } else {
    p
  }
})

# Create named list of plots
names(deg_pca_plots) <- tissues

# --------------------------------------
# FINAL DIAGNOSTIC FIGURE WITH COLOR FIXES
# --------------------------------------
library(patchwork)

# 1. Global PCA -----------------------------------------------------------
p_global <- ggplot(pca_data_global, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = BC)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = interaction(Tissue, BC)), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tissue_colors) +  # Ensure colors are applied
  scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
  labs(title = "A. Global Transcriptomic Architecture",
       x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_global[1], "% variance"),
       y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_global[2], "% variance")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# 2. Tissue DEG-PCA Plots with Consistent Colors --------------------------
create_colored_deg_pca <- function(tiss) {
  # Get tissue-specific DEG-PCA plot
  p <- tissue_plots[[tiss]]$deg
  
  # Modify to use tissue-specific color
  p <- p +
    geom_point(aes(shape = BC), size = 3, color = tissue_colors[tiss], alpha = 0.8) +  # Set fixed color
    scale_shape_manual(values = backcross_shapes) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("F1*GL" = "black", "F1*Pi" = "black")) +  # Set centroid color
    labs(title = tiss) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(color = tissue_colors[tiss], 
                                    face = "bold", size = 10))
  return(p)
}

# Create all tissue DEG-PCA plots
deg_pca_plots <- lapply(tissues, function(tiss) {
  create_colored_deg_pca(tiss)
})

# Arrange in grid
deg_grid <- wrap_plots(deg_pca_plots, ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(title = "B. Tissue-Specific DEG Separation",
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)))

# 3. Transcriptome Divergence ---------------------------------------------
p_divergence <- summary_df %>%
  filter(Tissue != "Global") %>%
  ggplot(aes(reorder(Tissue, -Transcriptome_Divergence), 
         Transcriptome_Divergence, fill = Tissue)) +
  geom_col() +  # Use geom_col for bar plot
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Transcriptome_Divergence, 3)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tissue_colors) +  # Apply color mapping
  labs(title = "C. Transcriptome Divergence",
       x = "", y = "Divergence Metric") +
  ylim(0, max(summary_df$Transcriptome_Divergence[summary_df$Tissue != "Global"], na.rm = TRUE) * 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# 4. Separation Distance --------------------------------------------------
p_separation <- summary_df %>%
  filter(Tissue != "Global") %>%
  ggplot(aes(reorder(Tissue, -Separation_Distance), 
         Separation_Distance, fill = Tissue)) +
  geom_col() +  # Use geom_col for bar plot
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Separation_Distance, 2)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tissue_colors) +  # Apply color mapping
  labs(title = "D. Population Separation Distance",
       x = "", y = "Centroid Distance (DEG-PCA space)") +
  ylim(0, max(summary_df$Separation_Distance[summary_df$Tissue != "Global"], na.rm = TRUE) * 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# 5. Combine all components ------------------------------------------------
# Using patchwork syntax: 
# | for side-by-side, / for top-to-bottom
diagnostic_figure <- (
  # Top row: Global PCA and metrics
  (p_global | (p_divergence / p_separation)) /
  # Bottom row: DEG-PCA grid
  deg_grid
) +
  # Set relative row heights
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.5)) 

# Save as PDF with Cairo device for better color support
ggsave("Final_Diagnostic_Figure.pdf", diagnostic_figure, 
       width = 16, height = 18, dpi = 300, device = cairo_pdf)

# Additional save as PNG for quick verification
ggsave("Final_Diagnostic_Figure.png", diagnostic_figure, 
       width = 16, height = 14, dpi = 300)


# List your tissue files
files <- c("Brain_DEG_Significant_Results.csv",
           "Kidney_DEG_Significant_Results.csv",
           "Liver_DEG_Significant_Results.csv",
           "Muscle_DEG_Significant_Results.csv",
           "Ovary_DEG_Significant_Results.csv",
           "Testis_DEG_Significant_Results.csv")

# Empty data frame to collect
all_genes <- data.frame(gene = character(), comparison = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (f in files) {
  
  # Read CSV with gene names as row names
  df <- read.csv(f, header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, row.names = 1)
  
  # Extract tissue name from file
  tissue <- sub("_DEG_Significant_Results.csv", "", f)
  
  # Create comparison label
  comp_str <- paste0("F1_GL vs F1_Pi_", tissue)
  
  # Get gene names
  genes <- rownames(df)
  
  # Append to all_genes
  temp <- data.frame(gene = genes, comparison = rep(comp_str, length(genes)), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  all_genes <- rbind(all_genes, temp)
}

# Save combined file
write.csv(all_genes, "All_Tissues_Genes_Comparison.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("Saved: All_Tissues_Genes_Comparison.csv\n")

library(pheatmap)

# Read combined file
df <- read.csv("All_Tissues_Genes_Comparison.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Split genes by tissue
gene_lists <- split(df$gene, df$comparison)
gene_lists <- lapply(gene_lists, unique)

# Find genes shared in all tissues
shared_all <- Reduce(intersect, gene_lists)

# Create presence/absence matrix for shared genes
all_genes <- shared_all  # only shared genes

presence_matrix <- sapply(gene_lists, function(genes) {
  all_genes %in% genes
})

colnames(presence_matrix) <- names(gene_lists)
rownames(presence_matrix) <- all_genes

# Heatmap
pheatmap(presence_matrix, 
         cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         main = "Presence/Absence of Shared Genes Across Tissues")

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)

df <- data.frame(
  GO_Term = c(
    "mitochondrial respiratory chain complex assembly",
    "electron transport chain",
    "ATP synthesis coupled electron transport",
    "epigenetic regulation of gene expression",
    "regulation of actin filament-based process",
    "amino acid biosynthetic process",
    "oxidative phosphorylation",
    "neural crest cell differentiation",
    "lipid oxidation",
    "regulation of muscle contraction",
    "amino acid metabolic process",
    "peptidyl-amino acid modification",
    "mitochondrial membrane organization",
    "meiotic cell cycle",
    "oogenesis"
  ),
  PValue  = c(0,0,0.01,0.01,0.01,0.01,0.01,0.02,0.02,0.03,0.03,0.03,0.04,0.04,0.04),
  F1GL_gt = c(72.73,81.82,87.5,17.65,65.52,100,87.5,14.29,54.55,88.89,71.43,80,77.78,7.14,0),
  F1GL_lt = c(27.27,18.18,12.5,82.35,34.48,0,12.5,85.71,45.45,11.11,28.57,20,22.22,92.86,100)
)

# Significance stars & factor for legend
df <- df %>%
  mutate(PValue_star = case_when(
    PValue <= 0.001 ~ "***",
    PValue <= 0.01  ~ "**",
    PValue <= 0.05  ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ ""
  ),
  PValue_cat = factor(PValue_star, 
                      levels = c("***", "**", "*", ""),
                      labels = c("p ≤ 0.001", "p ≤ 0.01", "p ≤ 0.05", "ns"))
  )

# Long format
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(c(F1GL_gt, F1GL_lt), names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Percent") %>%
  mutate(Direction = dplyr::recode(
    as.character(Direction),
    "F1GL_gt" = "F1 × GL > F1 × Pi",
    "F1GL_lt" = "F1 × GL < F1 × Pi"
  ))

# Order GO terms by p-value (most significant at top)
order_terms <- df %>% arrange(PValue) %>% pull(GO_Term)
df_long$GO_Term <- factor(df_long$GO_Term, levels = rev(order_terms))

# Create plot
p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Percent, y = GO_Term, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(Percent, 1), "%")), 
            position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5), size = 3, color = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F1 × GL > F1 × Pi" = "red",
                               "F1 × GL < F1 × Pi" = "darkgreen")) +
  geom_text(data = df,
            aes(x = 1.02, y = factor(GO_Term, levels = rev(order_terms)),
                label = PValue_star, color = PValue_cat),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            hjust = 0, size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "P-value", 
                     values = c("p ≤ 0.001" = "black",
                                "p ≤ 0.01" = "black",
                                "p ≤ 0.05" = "black",
                                "ns" = "grey60")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1.1), clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 40, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Proportion of genes (100%)", fill = "Direction",
       title = "GO Biological Process enrichment (directional proportions)")

# Save to PDF
ggsave(
  filename = "GO_Biological_Process_enrichment.pdf",
  plot = p,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  units = "in"
)


# Required packages
if(!requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly=TRUE)) install.packages("ggplot2")
if(!requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly=TRUE)) install.packages("dplyr")
if(!requireNamespace("tidyr", quietly=TRUE)) install.packages("tidyr")

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# ---- Data: replace or adapt if needed ----
counts <- data.frame(
  Comparison = c(
    "F1*GL Liver vs F1*Pi Liver",
    "F1*GL Brain vs F1*Pi Brain",
    "F1*GL Muscle vs F1*Pi Muscle",
    "F1*GL Kidney vs F1*Pi Kidney",
    "F1*GL Testis vs F1*Pi Testis",
    "F1*GL Ovary vs F1*Pi Ovary"
  ),
  DEGs = c(178, 343, 375, 948, 43, 11),
  up = c(81, 269, 162, 601, 15, 6),    # F1*GL > F1*Pi
  down = c(97, 74, 213, 347, 28, 5)    # F1*GL < F1*Pi
)

# make a short tissue name column
counts <- counts %>%
  mutate(tissue = c("Liver","Brain","Muscle","Kidney","Testis","Ovary"),
         total = up + down)

# order tissues by total (descending) for plotting
counts <- counts %>% arrange(desc(total))
counts$tissue <- factor(counts$tissue, levels = counts$tissue)

# pivot longer for ggplot
plot_df <- counts %>%
  select(tissue, up, down, total) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("up","down"), names_to = "direction", values_to = "n")

# set direction factor so fill ordering is stable (up at bottom)
plot_df$direction <- factor(plot_df$direction, levels = c("up","down"))

# ---- Plot ----
p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = tissue, y = n, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.65) +
  # counts inside bar segments
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3.2, color = "white") +
  # totals above bars
  geom_text(data = distinct(plot_df, tissue, .keep_all = TRUE),
            aes(x = tissue, y = total, label = total),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Direction",
    values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "darkgreen"),
    labels = c("F1*GL > F1*Pi (up)", "F1*GL < F1*Pi (down)")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of DEGs",
    title = "Stacked bar chart of DEG counts per tissue (F1*GL vs F1*Pi)",
    caption = "DEG counts by direction; thresholds used in DEG calling (report these in manuscript)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  )

# expand y-limits a little so totals don't overlap
ymax <- max(counts$total) * 1.10
p <- p + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, ymax))

# show
print(p)

# ---- Save files ----
ggsave("deg_stacked_bar.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("deg_stacked_bar.pdf", plot = p, width = 10, height = 6)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggforce)
library(tidyr)

# Reorder GO terms for plotting
data <- data %>% mutate(y = factor(Biological_Process, levels = rev(Biological_Process)))

# Prepare pie chart data
pie_data <- data %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(group = list(c("Up","Down")),
         value = list(c(Percent_GT, Percent_LT))) %>%
  unnest(c(group, value)) %>%
  group_by(GO_ID) %>%
  mutate(
    start = 2*pi*cumsum(c(0, head(value/100, -1))),
    end = 2*pi*cumsum(value/100)
  ) %>% ungroup()

# Plot with discrete y-axis
ggplot(pie_data, aes(y = y)) +
  geom_arc_bar(aes(
    x0 = Gene_Count, y0 = as.numeric(y), r0 = 0, r = 0.4,
    start = start, end = end, fill = group
  ), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up" = "steelblue", "Down" = "orange")) +
  scale_y_discrete() +  # <- use discrete scale for categorical axis
  labs(x = "Gene Count", y = "", fill = "Proportion") +
  theme_minimal()


# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(scatterpie)
library(stringr)

# Create the data frame
data <- data.frame(
    GO_Term_ID = c("GO:0033108", "GO:0022900", "GO:0042773", "GO:0040029", 
                   "GO:0032970", "GO:0008652", "GO:0006119", "GO:0014033", 
                   "GO:0034440", "GO:0006937", "GO:0006520", "GO:0018193", 
                   "GO:0007006", "GO:0051321", "GO:0048477"),
    Biological_Process = c("mitochondrial respiratory chain complex assembly", 
                           "electron transport chain", 
                           "ATP synthesis coupled electron transport", 
                           "epigenetic regulation of gene expression", 
                           "regulation of actin filament-based process", 
                           "amino acid biosynthetic process", 
                           "oxidative phosphorylation", 
                           "neural crest cell differentiation", 
                           "lipid oxidation", 
                           "regulation of muscle contraction", 
                           "amino acid metabolic process", 
                           "peptidyl-amino acid modification", 
                           "mitochondrial membrane organization", 
                           "meiotic cell cycle", 
                           "oogenesis"),
    P_Values = c(0, 0, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.02, 0.02, 0.03, 0.03, 0.03, 0.04, 0.04, 0.04),
    Gene_Count = c(11, 11, 8, 17, 29, 6, 8, 7, 11, 9, 21, 10, 9, 14, 7),
    Up = c(72.73, 81.82, 87.5, 17.65, 65.52, 100, 87.5, 14.29, 54.55, 88.89, 71.43, 80, 77.78, 7.14, 0),
    Down = c(27.27, 18.18, 12.5, 82.35, 34.48, 0, 12.5, 85.71, 45.45, 11.11, 28.57, 20, 22.22, 92.86, 100)
)

# Replace p-value 0 with 1e-10 for -log10 transformation
data$P_Values[data$P_Values == 0] <- 1e-10

# Prepare data for plotting
plot_data <- data %>%
    mutate(
        # Create transformed x-values
        x = -log10(P_Values),
        # Order processes by significance (most significant last)
        y = reorder(Biological_Process, -log10(P_Values)),
        # Calculate radius proportional to sqrt(Gene_Count)
        radius = 0.07 * sqrt(Gene_Count)
    ) %>%
    # Convert to numeric position for y-axis
    mutate(y_numeric = as.numeric(y))

# Wrap long process names for y-axis labels
n_levels <- nlevels(plot_data$y)
levels(plot_data$y) <- str_wrap(levels(plot_data$y), width = 30)

# Generate the plot
ggplot() +
    # Add pie charts
    geom_scatterpie(
        aes(x = x, y = y_numeric, r = radius),
        data = plot_data,
        cols = c("Up", "Down"),
        color = NA  # Remove pie borders
    ) +
    # Set fill colors and legend labels
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("Up" = "#FF0000", "Down" = "#0000FF"),
        name = "Expression",
        labels = c("F₁ × GL > F₁ × Pi", "F₁ × GL < F₁ × Pi")
    ) +
    # Configure y-axis
    scale_y_continuous(
        breaks = 1:n_levels,
        labels = levels(plot_data$y),
        expand = expansion(add = 0.5)
    ) +
    # Set coordinate limits to avoid clipping
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.5, n_levels + 0.5)) +
    # Axis labels and theme
    labs(x = "-log₁₀(P-Value)") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),  # Remove y-axis title
        axis.text.y = element_text(
            size = 8, 
            hjust = 1, 
            margin = margin(r = 10)  # Right margin for labels
        ),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 3), "cm"),  # Adjust margins (top, right, bottom, left)
        legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  


```
